meaning: n.[医](用电针替代普通金针的)电针刺
examples: Purpose to observe the curative effect of electroacupuncture on oculomotor paralysis.
Objective To observe the influence of electroacupuncture on intraoperative hemodynamics in old patients.
Objective to investigate the efficacy of electroacupuncture plus mild moxibustion for treating anorectal postoperative uroschesis.
